member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Adapters.SqlResponseAdapter
member.summary: Provides helpers to map SQL Server error codes to domain errors.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Adapters.SqlResponseAdapter.MapSqlServerError(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Maps a SQL Server error code and message to a .
member.param: The SQL error code as a string.
The error message.
member.returns: A representing the error.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Adapters.SqlResponseAdapter.MapSqlErrorNumber(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Maps a SQL Server error number to a with a user-friendly message.
member.param: The SQL Server error number.
The error message.
member.returns: A .

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Data.DataConverters
member.summary: Data Converters

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Data.DataConverters.GetDefaultOptions
member.summary: Get default JSON serialization options with camelCase naming

member.summary: Converts a JSON string to DataTable

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Data.DataConverters.SanitizeValueForSerialization(System.Object)

member.summary: Convert dictionary to string representation

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Data.DataConverters.SerializeObjectCustom``1(System.Object)
member.summary: Generic method to serialize any object to JSON

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Dtos.FilterQuery
member.summary: Represents a filter query with sorting and search capabilities for non-paginated results. Implements the minimal API binding pattern for automatic parameter binding. Ideal for reports, exports, and scenarios where all matching results are needed.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Dtos.FilterQuery.#ctor(System.String,System.Nullable{Acontplus.Core.Enums.SortDirection},System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Represents a filter query with sorting and search capabilities for non-paginated results. Implements the minimal API binding pattern for automatic parameter binding. Ideal for reports, exports, and scenarios where all matching results are needed.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Utilities.Dtos.FilterQuery.IsEmpty
member.summary: Gets whether the query has no search criteria.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Utilities.Dtos.FilterQuery.HasCriteria
member.summary: Gets whether the query has any criteria (search term or filters).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Dtos.FilterQuery.BindAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,System.Reflection.ParameterInfo)
member.summary: Binds query parameters from the HTTP context to create a FilterQuery instance. This method enables automatic parameter binding in minimal APIs.
member.param: The HTTP context containing query parameters
The parameter information (required by the binding contract)
member.returns: A ValueTask containing the bound FilterQuery or null

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Dtos.PaginationQuery
member.summary: Represents a pagination query with sorting and search capabilities. Implements the minimal API binding pattern for automatic parameter binding.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Dtos.PaginationQuery.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Represents a pagination query with sorting and search capabilities. Implements the minimal API binding pattern for automatic parameter binding.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Utilities.Dtos.PaginationQuery.Skip
member.summary: Gets the number of items to skip for database queries.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Utilities.Dtos.PaginationQuery.Take
member.summary: Gets the number of items to take for database queries.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Dtos.PaginationQuery.BindAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,System.Reflection.ParameterInfo)
member.summary: Binds query parameters from the HTTP context to create a PaginationQuery instance. This method enables automatic parameter binding in minimal APIs.
member.param: The HTTP context containing query parameters
The parameter information (required by the binding contract)
member.returns: A ValueTask containing the bound PaginationQuery or null

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.FilterQueryExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for FilterQuery to provide helper functionality.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.FilterQueryExtensions.GetFilterValue``1(Acontplus.Utilities.Dtos.FilterQuery,System.String,``0)
member.summary:
Gets a filter value by key with type safety and conversion support.
Conversion priority:
Direct cast — fastest path when the stored value is already the right type.
— handles all types (int, bool, decimal, DateTime, …) and values stored as strings (query-string origin).
— handles enums, Guid, and other types with registered converters.
Nullable value types (e.g. int?, bool?) are supported: the underlying type is extracted automatically so GetFilterValue<int?>("companyId") works as expected.
member.typeparam: Target type, including nullable value types.
member.param: The filter query.
The filter key to retrieve.
Returned when the key is absent, null, or conversion fails.
member.returns: The converted value, or .

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.FilterQueryExtensions.TryGetFilterValue``1(Acontplus.Utilities.Dtos.FilterQuery,System.String,``0@)
member.summary: Tries to get a filter value by key with type safety and conversion support. Returns true when the key exists and the value converts successfully to ; false when the key is absent or conversion fails.
member.typeparam: Target type, including nullable value types.
member.param: The filter query.
The filter key to retrieve.
The converted value when this method returns true; otherwise default.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.FilterQueryExtensions.ToFilterRequest(Acontplus.Utilities.Dtos.FilterQuery)
member.summary: Converts a to a . This is a direct property-to-property conversion that replaces the need for external mapping libraries (e.g., Mapster).
member.param: The source filter query.
member.returns: A new with the same filter values.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.FilterQueryExtensions.ToPaginationRequest(Acontplus.Utilities.Dtos.PaginationQuery)
member.summary: Converts a to a . This is a direct property-to-property conversion that replaces the need for external mapping libraries (e.g., Mapster).
member.param: The source pagination query.
member.returns: A new with the same pagination and filter values.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.ResultApiExtensions.ConfigureResponse
member.summary: Allows configuring the ApiResponse before it's returned in success cases. This is useful for adding global metadata, logging, or other cross-cutting concerns.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.ResultApiExtensions.ConfigureApiResponses(System.Action{Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.ApiResponse})
member.summary: Configures a global action to modify ApiResponse instances before they are returned.
member.param: The action to apply to each ApiResponse.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.ResultApiExtensions.ToBaseResponse``1(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.ApiResponse{``0})
member.summary: Converts generic ApiResponse<T> to base ApiResponse

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.ResultApiExtensions.ToActionResult``1(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.ApiResponse{``0})
member.summary: Converts ApiResponse<T> to IActionResult

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.ResultApiExtensions.ToMinimalApiResult``1(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.ApiResponse{``0})
member.summary: Converts ApiResponse<T> to IResult (for Minimal APIs)

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.ResultApiExtensions.ToActionResult(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.ApiResponse)
member.summary: Converts base ApiResponse to IActionResult with full status code support

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.ResultApiExtensions.ToMinimalApiResult(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.ApiResponse)
member.summary: Converts ApiResponse to IResult for Minimal APIs

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.ResultApiExtensions.WithPagination(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int64,System.Func{System.Int32,System.String})
member.summary: Adds pagination metadata with enhanced details

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.ResultApiExtensions.WithExecutionTime(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.TimeSpan,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds execution time metadata with precision control

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.ResultApiExtensions.WithCorrelationId(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.String)
member.summary: Adds correlation ID to metadata if not already present

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.ResultApiExtensions.ToPagedActionResult``1(Acontplus.Core.Domain.Common.Results.Result{Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.PagedResult{``0},Acontplus.Core.Domain.Common.Results.DomainError},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Converts Result<PagedResult<T>> to IActionResult with automatic pagination metadata

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.ResultApiExtensions.ToPagedActionResult``1(Acontplus.Core.Domain.Common.Results.Result{Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.PagedResult{``0},Acontplus.Core.Domain.Common.Results.DomainErrors},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Converts Result<PagedResult<T>> to IActionResult with automatic pagination metadata (DomainErrors)

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.ResultApiExtensions.ToPagedMinimalApiResult``1(Acontplus.Core.Domain.Common.Results.Result{Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.PagedResult{``0},Acontplus.Core.Domain.Common.Results.DomainError},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Converts Result<PagedResult<T>> to IResult with automatic pagination metadata (Minimal API)

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.ResultApiExtensions.ToPagedMinimalApiResult``1(Acontplus.Core.Domain.Common.Results.Result{Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.PagedResult{``0},Acontplus.Core.Domain.Common.Results.DomainErrors},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Converts Result<PagedResult<T>> to IResult with automatic pagination metadata (Minimal API, DomainErrors)

member.summary: Async version for Result<PagedResult<T>> to IActionResult

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.ResultApiExtensions.ToPagedActionResultAsync``1(System.Threading.Tasks.Task{Acontplus.Core.Domain.Common.Results.Result{Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.PagedResult{``0},Acontplus.Core.Domain.Common.Results.DomainErrors}},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Async version for Result<PagedResult<T>> to IActionResult (DomainErrors)

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.ResultApiExtensions.ToPagedMinimalApiResultAsync``1(System.Threading.Tasks.Task{Acontplus.Core.Domain.Common.Results.Result{Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.PagedResult{``0},Acontplus.Core.Domain.Common.Results.DomainError}},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Async version for Result<PagedResult<T>> to IResult (Minimal API)

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.ResultApiExtensions.ToPagedMinimalApiResultAsync``1(System.Threading.Tasks.Task{Acontplus.Core.Domain.Common.Results.Result{Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.PagedResult{``0},Acontplus.Core.Domain.Common.Results.DomainErrors}},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Async version for Result<PagedResult<T>> to IResult (Minimal API, DomainErrors)

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.UtilitiesServiceExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for to register Acontplus.Utilities services.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Extensions.UtilitiesServiceExtensions.AddObjectMapper(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingProfile[])
member.summary: Registers the compiled object mapper as a singleton in the service collection. Configures the with the provided profiles, compiles all mapping delegates at startup, and registers the resulting as a singleton.
member.param: The service collection to register the mapper into.
Zero or more instances to register. When no profiles are provided, convention-based mappings are still available on demand.
member.returns: The same instance for fluent chaining.
member.exception: Thrown when has already been registered in the service collection.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Format.CompressionUtils
member.summary: Provides utility methods for compressing and decompressing data using Deflate and GZip algorithms, and for decompressing DataTable columns.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Format.CompressionUtils.CompressDeflate(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Compresses a byte array using the Deflate algorithm.
member.param: The byte array to compress.
member.returns: The compressed byte array.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Format.CompressionUtils.DecompressDeflate(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decompresses a byte array that was compressed using the Deflate algorithm.
member.param: The compressed byte array.
member.returns: The decompressed byte array.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Format.CompressionUtils.CompressGZip(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Compresses a byte array using the GZip algorithm.
member.param: The byte array to compress.
member.returns: The compressed byte array.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Format.CompressionUtils.DecompressGZip(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decompresses a byte array that was compressed using the GZip algorithm.
member.param: The compressed byte array.
member.returns: The decompressed byte array.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Format.CompressionUtils.DecompressColumn(System.Data.DataSet,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Decompresses a column in a table from GZip-compressed byte arrays to UTF-8 strings.
member.param: The containing the table.
The name of the table to process.
The name of the column containing compressed data.
The name of the column to store decompressed strings.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Format.CompressionUtils.DecompressColumn(System.Data.DataTable,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Decompresses a column in a from GZip-compressed byte arrays to UTF-8 strings.
member.param: The to process.
The name of the column containing compressed data.
The name of the column to store decompressed strings.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Format.XmlTextWriterExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for writing XML elements with optional values.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Format.XmlTextWriterExtensions.WriteElement(System.Xml.XmlTextWriter,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Writes an XML element with the specified name and value, writing an empty string if the value is null.
member.param: The to write to.
The name of the XML element.
The value to write inside the element, or null for an empty element.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.IO.DirectoryHelper
member.summary: Provides helper methods for working with application directories.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.IO.DirectoryHelper.GetRuntimeDirectory
member.summary: Gets the directory of the currently executing entry assembly at runtime.
member.returns: The absolute path to the runtime directory.
member.exception: Thrown if the runtime directory cannot be determined.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.IO.EnvironmentHelper
member.summary: Provides helper methods for retrieving the current application environment.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.IO.EnvironmentHelper.GetEnvironment
member.summary: Gets the current ASP.NET Core environment as an value.
member.returns: The current environment as an enum.
member.exception: Thrown if the environment variable is not set.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.IO.FileExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for file name sanitization and file data conversion.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.IO.FileExtensions.SanitizeFileName(System.String)
member.summary: Removes invalid characters from a file name and trims whitespace.
member.param: The file name to sanitize.
member.returns: A sanitized file name containing only valid characters.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.IO.FileExtensions.GetBase64FromByte(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Converts a byte array to a Base64-encoded string.
member.param: The byte array to convert.
member.returns: A Base64-encoded string representation of the byte array.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.IO.FileExtensions.GetBytes(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Reads the contents of an and returns it as a byte array.
member.param: The uploaded file to read.
member.returns: A byte array containing the file's contents.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Json.JsonHelper
member.summary: Advanced JSON utilities building on core JSON functionality

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Json.JsonHelper.ValidateJson(System.String)
member.summary: Validate JSON and return validation result with error details

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Json.JsonHelper.GetJsonProperty``1(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get JSON property value with strongly typed return

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Json.JsonHelper.MergeJson(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Merge two JSON objects (second object properties overwrite first)

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Json.JsonHelper.AreEqual(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Compare two JSON strings for equality (ignoring property order)

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Json.JsonHelper.JsonValidationResult
member.summary: Result of JSON validation

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Json.JsonHelper.JsonValidationResult.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Result of JSON validation

member.summary: JSON manipulation extensions

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Json.JsonManipulationExtensions.IsValidJson(System.String)
member.summary: Extension method to validate JSON string

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Json.JsonManipulationExtensions.GetJsonProperty``1(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Extension method to get JSON property

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Json.JsonManipulationExtensions.MergeJson(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Extension method to merge JSON

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Json.JsonManipulationExtensions.JsonEquals(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Extension method to compare JSON

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.CompiledObjectMapper
member.summary: Default implementation of backed by pre-compiled Expression-tree delegates. Register as a singleton via services.AddObjectMapper(...).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.CompiledObjectMapper.#ctor(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MapperRegistry)
member.summary: Initialises the mapper with a fully built .
member.param: A fully initialised registry containing compiled delegates for all registered type pairs.
member.exception: Thrown when is null.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.CompiledObjectMapper.Registry
member.summary: Exposes the internal registry for use by the backward-compatibility static shim when registering late CreateMap calls after Build().

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.CompiledObjectMapper.MapInternal``2(``0,Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair)
member.summary: Resolves and invokes the compiled delegate for the specified type pair. Falls back to runtime type resolution when the declared source type differs from the actual runtime type.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.CompiledObjectMapper.ResolveDelegate``2(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair)
member.summary: Resolves the typed mapping delegate for the specified type pair. Uses the registry cache or compiles a convention delegate on demand.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.CompiledObjectMapper.CopyProperties``1(``0,``0)
member.summary: Copies all writable public properties from to . Used by the "map into existing" overload to apply mapped values onto an existing target instance.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.DelegateCompiler
member.summary: Compiles trees into Func<TSource, TTarget> delegates. Handles flat, nested, collection, and constructor-based mappings.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.DelegateCompiler.Compile(System.Linq.Expressions.LambdaExpression)
member.summary: Compiles the provided expression tree into a typed delegate and returns it wrapped as a .
member.param: A previously built by .
member.returns: The compiled delegate ready for invocation.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.DelegateCompiler.CompileConvention(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair,Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MapperRegistry)
member.summary: Builds and compiles a delegate for a convention-based with no explicit configuration.
member.param: The source-to-target type pair to build a convention mapping for.
The mapper registry used to resolve nested pair delegates during expression building.
member.returns: The compiled convention mapping delegate.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder
member.summary: Builds trees for mapping and projection operations. Does not perform compilation — returns instances only.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.SimpleTypes
member.summary: Set of types considered "simple" for the purposes of flat mapping. Includes numeric primitives, bool, char, string, decimal, DateTime, DateTimeOffset, TimeSpan, Guid, enums, and their wrappers.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.BuildMappingExpression(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair,Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpressionBase,Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MapperRegistry,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair})
member.summary: Builds a for the given and optional configuration. Handles flat member mappings with case-insensitive name matching, type conversion, ForMember rules, delegate resolvers, and Ignore rules. When the target type lacks a parameterless constructor, applies constructor-parameter mapping with priority-based argument resolution.
member.param: The source-to-target type pair to build the expression for.
Optional configuration containing custom member rules, delegate resolvers, and ignore rules. When null, convention-only mapping is applied.
The mapper registry for resolving nested pair delegates. Not used for flat mapping but accepted for future nested/cycle support.
Set of type pairs currently being compiled, used for cycle detection. Not used for flat mapping but accepted for future nested support.
member.returns: A of the form (TSource source) => new TTarget { ... } with member init bindings for all resolvable destination properties.
member.exception: Thrown when the target type has no parameterless constructor and no public constructor is fully satisfiable, or when a ForCtorParam rule references a parameter that does not exist on any constructor of the target type.

member.summary: Builds a mapping expression using the parameterless constructor and member init bindings. This is the original flat-mapping path.
Builds a mapping expression using constructor-parameter mapping. Selects the best public constructor, resolves arguments, and wraps with for remaining settable properties.
member.exception: Thrown when no public constructor is fully satisfiable or when a ForCtorParam rule references a non-existent parameter.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.ValidateCtorParamRules(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair,System.Type,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Linq.Expressions.LambdaExpression})
member.summary: Validates that all ForCtorParam rule names correspond to an actual parameter on at least one public constructor of the target type. Throws if a rule names a non-existent parameter.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.SelectBestConstructor(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair,System.Type,System.Linq.Expressions.ParameterExpression,System.Reflection.PropertyInfo[],System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Linq.Expressions.LambdaExpression})
member.summary: Selects the best public constructor for the target type based on the number of satisfiable parameters. A constructor is "fully satisfiable" when ALL its parameters can be resolved. Among fully satisfiable constructors, the one with the most parameters is preferred. Ties are broken by order (first wins).
member.returns: A tuple of the selected constructor and its resolved argument expressions.
member.exception: Thrown when no public constructor is fully satisfiable.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.ResolveConstructorParameter(System.Reflection.ParameterInfo,System.Linq.Expressions.ParameterExpression,System.Reflection.PropertyInfo[],System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Linq.Expressions.LambdaExpression})
member.summary: Resolves a single constructor parameter's argument expression using the priority order: ForCtorParam rule → convention name match → declared default value. Returns null if the parameter cannot be resolved.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.IsAssignableForCtorParam(System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether a source type is assignable to a constructor parameter type, considering direct assignability, nullable conversions, and numeric conversions.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.BuildCtorParamValueExpression(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Builds the value expression for a constructor parameter from a matched source property, handling type conversion and null safety for value-type parameters.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.IsInitOnlySetter(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Determines whether a property has an init-only setter (not a regular public setter). A property is considered init-only if it has a setter marked with the IsExternalInit modifier but that setter is NOT public. Properties with public setters that are also init (e.g., public init) are treated as regular writable properties.

Builds a member binding for a single destination property, applying the member resolution priority: Ignore → ForMember expression → delegate resolver → convention match. For convention-matched complex-type properties, recursively builds nested mapping expressions with cycle detection. Returns null if the member should be omitted from bindings.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.BuildConventionValueExpression(System.Linq.Expressions.ParameterExpression,System.Reflection.PropertyInfo,System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Builds the value expression for a convention-matched property, handling type compatibility and null source values.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.BuildTypeConversionExpression(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Builds a type conversion expression from the source member access to the destination type. Returns null if conversion is not possible.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.BuildChangeTypeExpression(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Builds a Convert.ChangeType expression wrapped in a try/catch that returns default(TDest) on failure.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.BuildNullGuardedExpression(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Wraps a value expression with a null guard. When the source is null, produces null for nullable reference types or default(T) for non-nullable value types.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.BuildDelegateResolverExpression(System.Linq.Expressions.ParameterExpression,System.Func{System.Object,System.Object},System.Type)
member.summary: Builds an expression that invokes a boxed Func<object, object?> delegate resolver, casting the result to the destination property type.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.ReplaceParameter(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Linq.Expressions.ParameterExpression,System.Linq.Expressions.ParameterExpression)
member.summary: Replaces occurrences of in with .

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.ReplaceParameter(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Linq.Expressions.ParameterExpression,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression)
member.summary: Replaces occurrences of in with an arbitrary expression. Used for inlining nested lambda bodies where the parameter is replaced with a property access expression.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.EnsureType(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Type)
member.summary: Ensures that the expression is of the specified type, adding a conversion if necessary.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.IsSimpleType(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether a type is considered a "simple type" for mapping purposes.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.IsNumericOrConvertible(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether a type supports direct numeric/primitive conversion via Expression.Convert.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.IsNullableType(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether a type is nullable (either a or a reference type).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.HasWritableSetter(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Determines whether a destination property has a writable setter (public set or init-only).

Builds a for a collection-type destination property. Resolves element types, obtains or compiles the element mapping delegate from the registry, builds a Enumerable.Select(...).ToList()/ToArray() expression, and wraps with a null guard.
member.param: The destination collection property to bind.
The source collection property to read from.
The source parameter expression.
The mapper registry for resolving element delegates.
Factory function for compiling element delegates on demand.
member.returns: A for the collection mapping, or null if types cannot be resolved.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.IsCollectionType(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether a type is a collection type (implements but is not ).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.GetCollectionElementType(System.Type)
member.summary: Extracts the generic element type from a collection type. For arrays returns the element type; for generic collections returns the generic argument.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.BuildSelectExpression(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Delegate,System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Builds a Enumerable.Select(source, elementMapper) expression that projects each element through the element mapping delegate.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.BuildMaterialisationExpression(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Appends the appropriate materialisation method call to the : .ToArray() for T[] destinations, .ToList() for all other supported collection types.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.BuildCollectionNullGuard(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Wraps the materialised collection expression with a null guard: if source is null → null (nullable dest) or new List<T>() / new T[0] (non-nullable dest).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.BuildEmptyCollectionExpression(System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Builds an expression that creates an empty collection of the appropriate concrete type for non-nullable destination collection properties.

Builds an expression for mapping a nested complex-type property. Handles cycle detection by producing a deferred Lazy<Func<TNestedSource, TNestedTarget>> closure when a cycle is detected, or inlining the nested lambda body when no cycle exists. The result is wrapped in a null guard for the source property.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.BuildDeferredCyclicMapping(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Type,System.Type,Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MapperRegistry)
member.summary: Builds a deferred mapping invocation for cyclic type pairs. Creates a Lazy<Func<TNestedSource, TNestedTarget>> that resolves the compiled delegate from the registry after all compilation completes. The expression tree captures Expression.Invoke(Expression.Property(lazyConst, "Value"), sourceExpr).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.CreateLazyRegistryResolver(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MapperRegistry,Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair,System.Type,System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Creates a Lazy<Func<TNestedSource, TNestedTarget>> instance whose factory resolves the compiled mapping delegate from the registry. The Lazy ensures the delegate is fetched exactly once, on first invocation (which occurs after Build() completes).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.BuildNestedNullGuard(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Wraps a nested complex-type mapping expression with a null guard. When the source property is null, assigns null for nullable reference types or default(TTarget) for non-nullable value types.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.BuildProjectionExpression(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair,Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpressionBase)
member.summary: Builds a pure suitable for passing to IQueryable<TSource>.Select(...). Uses the same member-resolution rules as but throws for any member that requires Convert.ChangeType or uses a Func<> delegate resolver. Nested complex-type pairs are inlined recursively; cycles throw .
member.param: The source-to-target type pair to build the projection expression for.
Optional configuration containing custom member rules, delegate resolvers, and ignore rules. When null, convention-only projection is applied.
member.returns: A of the form (TSource source) => new TTarget { ... } suitable for LINQ query provider translation.
member.exception: Thrown when a member requires Convert.ChangeType, uses a Func<> delegate resolver, or when a cycle is detected in nested complex-type projection.
Thrown when the target type has no satisfiable constructor.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.BuildProjectionExpressionInternal(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair,Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpressionBase,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair})
member.summary: Internal recursive implementation of with cycle detection via an set.
Builds a projection expression using the parameterless constructor and member init bindings. Produces a pure expression tree without Convert.ChangeType or delegate resolvers.
Builds a projection expression using constructor-parameter mapping. Produces a pure expression tree with a containing named arguments.
Selects the best public constructor for projection, applying the same resolution rules as but without delegate-based resolution.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.ResolveProjectionConstructorParameter(System.Reflection.ParameterInfo,System.Linq.Expressions.ParameterExpression,System.Reflection.PropertyInfo[],System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Linq.Expressions.LambdaExpression})
member.summary: Resolves a constructor parameter for projection. Uses the same priority order as (ForCtorParam → convention → default) but produces only pure expression-tree compatible values — no delegate-based resolution.

Builds a member binding for a single destination property in projection mode. Applies the member resolution priority: Ignore → ForMember expression → convention match. Throws for delegate resolvers or Convert.ChangeType.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.BuildProjectionValueExpression(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Builds a value expression for projection, enforcing that no Convert.ChangeType is used. Throws for type conversions that require runtime conversion.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.IsProjectionAssignable(System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether a source type is assignable to a destination type for projection purposes, without requiring Convert.ChangeType.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.BuildProjectionTypeConversion(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Builds a type conversion expression for projection that is safe for LINQ query providers. Only uses Expression.Convert for directly convertible types.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.ParameterReplacer
member.summary: Expression visitor that replaces one with another. Used to rebind lambda bodies to the mapping source parameter.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.Internal.ExpressionBuilder.ParameterExpressionReplacer
member.summary: Expression visitor that replaces a with an arbitrary . Used for inlining nested lambda bodies where the parameter is replaced with a property access expression (e.g., source.Address).

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.IObjectMapper
member.summary: Abstraction for compiled-delegate object mapping. Register via services.AddObjectMapper(...) and inject as a singleton.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.IObjectMapper.Map``2(``0)
member.summary: Maps to a new instance.
member.typeparam: The source type to map from.
The target type to map to.
member.param: The source object to map.
member.returns: A new instance of populated from .

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.IObjectMapper.Map``2(``0,``1)
member.summary: Maps onto an existing .
member.typeparam: The source type to map from.
The target type to map to.
member.param: The source object to map.
The existing target instance to map onto.
member.returns: The instance with mapped values applied.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.IObjectMapper.Map``2(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Maps each element of to .
member.typeparam: The source element type to map from.
The target element type to map to.
member.param: The source collection to map.
member.returns: An enumerable of mapped instances.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.IObjectMapper.ProjectTo``2(System.Linq.IQueryable{``0})
member.summary: Projects a queryable source sequence to using a pure tree so that LINQ query providers (e.g., EF Core) can translate the projection to SQL without materialising source objects.
member.typeparam: The source element type to project from.
The target element type to project to.
member.param: The queryable source sequence to project.
member.returns: An of projected instances.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MapperConfiguration
member.summary: Immutable snapshot of all registered mapping profiles. Call to validate configurations, compile delegates, and produce a . After returns, no further profiles may be added.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MapperConfiguration.AddProfile(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingProfile)
member.summary: Adds a to the configuration. All registrations from the profile are merged into the internal configuration store.
member.param: The profile instance containing mapping registrations.
member.returns: This instance for fluent chaining.
member.exception: Thrown when is null.
Thrown if called after has been invoked, indicating that the configuration is sealed and no further profiles may be registered.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MapperConfiguration.Build
member.summary: Validates all registered s in a single pass, compiles delegates for each one, and returns a fully initialised . Throws a single listing every violation if any ForMember target does not exist or has an incompatible resolved type. Seals this configuration — further calls to will throw.
member.returns: A fully initialised ready for mapping operations.
member.exception: Thrown when one or more validation violations are found across registered type pairs. The message lists every violation found during validation.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MapperConfiguration.CompileDelegate
member.summary: Internal hook for delegate compilation. Set by the ExpressionBuilder/DelegateCompiler subsystem when it is available. When null, Build() validates and creates the registry without compiling delegates (pairs will be compiled on first use via convention mapping).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MapperConfiguration.Registrations
member.summary: Gets the merged registrations dictionary. Used internally for testing and by future compilation infrastructure.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MapperConfiguration.ConventionOnlyExpression
member.summary: Internal expression class for convention-only reverse-map registrations. Contains no custom rules — all members map by name convention.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MapperRegistry
member.summary: Thread-safe store for compiled Func<TSource, TTarget> mapping delegates, keyed by . After startup, all operations are lock-free concurrent reads. Unregistered pairs are compiled exactly once on first use via factories.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MapperRegistry.Register(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair,System.Delegate)
member.summary: Registers a pre-compiled delegate for the specified . Overwrites any existing entry for the same .
member.param: The source-to-target type pair identifying the mapping route.
The compiled mapping delegate to store.
member.exception: Thrown when is null.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MapperRegistry.GetOrAdd(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair,System.Func{Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair,System.Delegate})
member.summary: Returns the compiled delegate for the specified . If the pair is not yet registered, the is invoked exactly once (even under concurrent access) to produce the delegate, which is then cached for all subsequent calls.
member.param: The source-to-target type pair identifying the mapping route.
A factory function that compiles and returns a mapping delegate for the given . Invoked at most once per .
member.returns: The compiled mapping delegate for the specified .
member.exception: Thrown when is null.
Thrown when the cannot produce a valid delegate for the pair (e.g., no satisfiable constructor, no matched members for convention mapping).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MapperRegistry.TryGet(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair,System.Delegate@)
member.summary: Attempts to retrieve the compiled delegate for the specified .
member.param: The source-to-target type pair identifying the mapping route.
When this method returns true, contains the compiled delegate for the pair; otherwise, null.
member.returns: true if a compiled delegate exists (or has been lazily initialised) for the specified ; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MapperRegistry.RegisterConfiguration(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair,Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpressionBase)
member.summary: Stores the configuration for the specified . Used by ProjectTo to retrieve member rules when building projection expressions.
member.param: The source-to-target type pair identifying the mapping route.
The configuration to store, or null for convention-only mappings.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MapperRegistry.TryGetConfiguration(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair,Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpressionBase@)
member.summary: Attempts to retrieve the configuration for the specified .
member.param: The source-to-target type pair identifying the mapping route.
When this method returns true, contains the configuration for the pair; otherwise, null.
member.returns: true if a configuration exists for the specified ; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpression`2
member.summary: Fluent builder for configuring the mapping from to . Instantiated by and provides chainable methods for custom member, ignore, constructor, and reverse-map configuration.
member.typeparam: The source type to map from.
The target type to map to.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpression`2.#ctor(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair,Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpressionBase})
member.summary: Initialises a new for the specified type pair, linked to the owning profile's registration dictionary.
member.param: The source-to-target type pair this expression describes.
The owning profile's registration dictionary, used for reverse-map registration.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpression`2.ForMember``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``0}},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,``0}})
member.summary: Maps a destination member via a source member expression.
member.typeparam: The type of the destination property.
member.param: An expression selecting the destination property to configure. Must resolve to a writable property of .
An expression selecting the source member whose value will be assigned to the destination property.
member.returns: This instance for fluent chaining.
member.exception: Thrown at configuration time if does not resolve to a writable property of .

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpression`2.ForMember``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``0}},System.Func{`0,``0})
member.summary: Maps a destination member via an arbitrary delegate resolver. Note: this overload is incompatible with ProjectTo because LINQ query providers cannot inspect compiled delegates.
member.typeparam: The type of the destination property.
member.param: An expression selecting the destination property to configure. Must resolve to a writable property of .
A delegate that computes the destination property value from the source object.
member.returns: This instance for fluent chaining.
member.exception: Thrown at configuration time if does not resolve to a writable property of .

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpression`2.Ignore``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`1,``0}})
member.summary: Excludes a destination member from forward-direction mapping. The exclusion does not propagate to any reverse mapping registered via .
member.typeparam: The type of the destination property.
member.param: An expression selecting the destination property to ignore. Must resolve to a writable property of .
member.returns: This instance for fluent chaining.
member.exception: Thrown at configuration time if does not resolve to a writable property of .

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpression`2.ForCtorParam``1(System.String,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,``0}})
member.summary: Binds a source member expression to a named constructor parameter on . Validation that the parameter exists on the selected constructor occurs at delegate-compilation time, not here.
member.typeparam: The type of the constructor parameter.
member.param: The name of the constructor parameter to bind (case-insensitive matching).
An expression selecting the source member whose value will be passed as the constructor argument.
member.returns: This instance for fluent chaining.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or empty.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpression`2.ReverseMap
member.summary: Registers the inverse ( → ) using only name-based convention matching. Forward ForMember, ForCtorParam, and Ignore rules are NOT carried over to the reverse direction.
member.returns: This instance for fluent chaining.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpressionBase
member.summary: Abstract base class that holds the raw rule data collected during profile configuration. inherits from this class and populates these collections via the fluent API. The expression builder reads from these collections during delegate compilation.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpressionBase.#ctor(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair)
member.summary: Initialises a new for the specified type pair.
member.param: The source-to-target type pair this expression describes.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpressionBase.Pair
member.summary: The source-to-target type pair this expression describes.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpressionBase.MemberRules
member.summary: Custom member mapping rules keyed by destination property name. A null value indicates an Ignore rule for that member.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpressionBase.DelegateResolvers
member.summary: Delegate-based resolvers keyed by destination property name. These store boxed Func<object, object?> wrappers and are incompatible with ProjectTo because LINQ query providers cannot inspect compiled delegates.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpressionBase.CtorParamRules
member.summary: Constructor parameter rules keyed by parameter name (case-insensitive). Each value is a that resolves the source value for the named constructor parameter on the target type.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpressionBase.HasReverseMap
member.summary: Indicates whether .ReverseMap() was called, signalling that the inverse should be registered using name-based convention matching.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingExpressionBase.ValidateDestinationExpression``2(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,``1}})
member.summary: Validates that the destination expression resolves to a writable property (public setter or init-only setter) on the target type.
member.param: The destination member expression to validate.
member.typeparam: The target type.
The property type.
member.returns: The property name extracted from the expression.
member.exception: Thrown when the expression does not resolve to a writable property of .

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingProfile
member.summary: Base class for grouping a set of CreateMap registrations. Derive from this class and register instances via services.AddObjectMapper(profile).
member.remarks: The derived class constructor should call one or more times to define the mappings owned by this profile.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingProfile.Registrations
member.summary: Gets the internal collection of registrations keyed by . This is read by MapperConfiguration during the build phase.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingProfile.#ctor
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.MappingProfile.CreateMap``2
member.summary: Registers a mapping from to and returns a fluent builder for further configuration.
member.typeparam: The source type to map from.
The target type to map to.
member.returns: A instance for fluent configuration of member mappings, ignores, constructor parameters, and reverse mapping.
member.remarks:
Calling this method a second time for the same within the same profile overwrites the previous registration for that pair, fulfilling requirement 3.1.
The inverse is NOT registered by this method. Use to explicitly register the reverse direction with convention-only rules (requirement 3.6).

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair
member.summary: Identifies a unique mapping route from to . Implemented as a value type to allow efficient use as a dictionary key.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair.SourceType
member.summary: The source CLR type.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair.TargetType
member.summary: The target CLR type.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair.#ctor(System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Initialises a new .
member.param: The source CLR type.
The target CLR type.
member.exception: Thrown when or is null.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair.op_Equality(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair,Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair)
member.summary: Determines whether two instances are equal.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair.op_Inequality(Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair,Acontplus.Utilities.Mapping.TypePair)
member.summary: Determines whether two instances are not equal.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Security.Helpers.PathSecurityValidator
member.summary: Provides secure path validation to prevent directory traversal attacks and other path-based security vulnerabilities. This utility should be used whenever user input or external data is used to construct file paths.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Security.Helpers.PathSecurityValidator.ValidateAndResolvePath(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that the requested path is within the allowed base directory and doesn't contain path traversal attempts.
member.param: The base directory that contains allowed files
The requested path to validate (can be relative)
member.returns: The fully resolved and validated absolute path
member.exception: Thrown when baseDirectory or requestedPath is null
Thrown when the path contains invalid characters, attempts directory traversal, or resolves outside the base directory
member.remarks: This method performs comprehensive validation including: - Null byte detection - Invalid path character detection - Relative path component detection (../) - Absolute path detection (C:\, /etc/) - UNC path detection (\\server\share) - Path traversal prevention (ensures resolved path stays within base directory)

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Security.Helpers.PathSecurityValidator.ValidateFileExtension(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Validates that the file extension is in the allowed list.
member.param: The file path to validate
Array of allowed extensions (e.g., ".rdlc", ".rdl", ".pdf"). Case-insensitive.
member.exception: Thrown when filePath or allowedExtensions is null
Thrown when the extension is not allowed or missing

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Security.Helpers.PathSecurityValidator.ValidateFileExists(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a file exists at the specified path and is accessible.
member.param: The file path to check
member.exception: Thrown when filePath is null
Thrown when the file doesn't exist
Thrown when the file is not accessible

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Security.Helpers.PathSecurityValidator.IsPathWithinDirectory(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a path is within a specified directory (prevents path traversal).
member.param: The path to check (should be absolute)
The directory that should contain the path (should be absolute)
member.returns: True if path is within directory, false otherwise

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Security.Helpers.PathSecurityValidator.SanitizeFileName(System.String,System.Char)
member.summary: Sanitizes a file name by removing potentially dangerous characters while preserving the extension. Use this for user-provided file names that will be saved to disk.
member.param: The file name to sanitize
Character to replace invalid characters with (default: underscore)
member.returns: A sanitized file name safe for use in file systems

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Security.Helpers.PathSecurityValidator.CombinePathSecurely(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Validates and combines multiple path segments safely. Throws if any segment attempts path traversal.
member.param: The base directory
Path segments to combine
member.returns: The validated combined path
member.exception: Thrown if path traversal is detected in any segment

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Security.Interfaces.ISensitiveDataEncryptionService
member.summary: Defines asynchronous methods for encrypting and decrypting sensitive data.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Security.Interfaces.ISensitiveDataEncryptionService.EncryptToBytesAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously encrypts the provided plaintext string using AES-256-GCM (authenticated encryption) and returns the encrypted data as a byte array.
member.param: The passphrase used to derive the AES-256 key via PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256.
The plaintext string to encrypt.
member.returns: A Task containing a byte array with layout: Salt (16) + Nonce (12) + Tag (16) + Ciphertext.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Security.Interfaces.ISensitiveDataEncryptionService.DecryptFromBytesAsync(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Asynchronously decrypts the provided byte array using AES-256-GCM and returns the decrypted plaintext string. Throws if authentication tag verification fails.
member.param: The passphrase (must match the one used for encryption).
The byte array with layout: Salt (16) + Nonce (12) + Tag (16) + Ciphertext.
member.returns: A Task containing the decrypted plaintext string.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Security.Services.SensitiveDataEncryptionService
member.summary: Provides authenticated encryption using AES-256-GCM (AEAD). Layout of encrypted output: Salt (16 bytes) + Nonce (12 bytes) + Tag (16 bytes) + Ciphertext.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Security.Services.SensitiveDataEncryptionService.EncryptToBytesAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Encrypts the provided data using AES-256-GCM (authenticated encryption) and returns the encrypted byte array.
member.param: The passphrase used to derive the encryption key via PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256.
The plaintext data to encrypt.
member.returns: A byte array containing Salt (16) + Nonce (12) + Tag (16) + Ciphertext.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Security.Services.SensitiveDataEncryptionService.DecryptFromBytesAsync(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decrypts the provided byte array using AES-256-GCM and returns the plaintext string. Throws if the tag verification fails (data is tampered or passphrase is wrong).
member.param: The passphrase used to derive the decryption key (must match the passphrase used for encryption).
The byte array containing Salt (16) + Nonce (12) + Tag (16) + Ciphertext.
member.returns: The decrypted plaintext string.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Text.TextHandlers
member.summary: Provides text manipulation utilities for string formatting and splitting.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Utilities.Text.TextHandlers.StringSplit(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Splits a string into lines of a specified length, inserting a newline (\\n) after each segment.
member.param: The input string to split.
The maximum length of each line segment.
member.returns: The formatted string with line breaks.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Utilities.Time.NullableDateTimeConverter
member.summary: Converter for nullable DateTime values
